race.comment: THRILLING VENTURE (8) raced handy and didn't shirk the task when a close fourth first-up in a 1000m Highway at Gosford. Mitchell Bell takes over and he enjoys a 29% strike rate for this stable. Ideally drawn and looks the one to beat back in this grade. PRINCESS CRUIZER (5) is racing very well with four consecutive top three finishes, the last three at Newcastle. Coming back to 900m is the query but she will be putting in the big ones late. WELCOME GYPSY (3) hasn't fired in four runs this prep over longer trips. Drops back to 900m today which is the key - she has two wins and two placings from five tries here at the trip. Can improve sharply. TOO DARN FINESSE (10) is a lightly raced filly back from a five-month spell. Has raced just twice with a win over 1000m at Scone on debut the highlight. Trialling well and should kick on this time in work. FIRST LANDING (1) needs the run but generally contests better races than this.
